content:
This is more like a record of my playthrough, there might be an error in some part because I just recorded it for my collection.
I often recommend people to play this game, but because of the languages, and gacha games, they don't want to play it.
I understand that part because I can't play some type of game, so I think I will record it, so they could go watch it.

Small note : Tawil's boss fight I record here is in GRamona's story, I don't want to go back to the prologue to read all story again to record it.
And yet, they are in the similar storyline, but in the different universe, so I guess it's ok?

I didn't cut the cutscene during Tohuwabohu's chapter cause I want to show people why did I cry when I read that chapter...

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=duJZRzzMwM8&t=

embeds.description: "Lotan has so many labels attached to her that no one knows how to approach this black-clad swordswoman.
